audit_status.source_base: Hebrew Deuteronomy / Devarim election, herem, covenant loyalty, and conquest exhortation, draft aligned later
audit_status.review_note: First-pass draft reviewed for seven nations, total-destruction and no-covenant commands, intermarriage rationale, sacred-site destruction, treasured-people election, covenant love, fertility/health blessings, gradual conquest, and idol-metal prohibition.

verses.restored: When YHWH your Divine brings you into land where you are entering to possess it and clears away many nations from before you—Hittite, Girgashite, Amorite, Canaanite, Perizzite, Hivite, and Jebusite, seven nations greater and mightier than you—
and YHWH your Divine gives them before you and you strike them, you shall surely devote them to destruction; you shall cut no covenant with them and show them no favor.
You shall not intermarry with them; your daughter you shall not give to his son, and his daughter you shall not take for your son.
For he will turn your child from after me, and they will serve other gods; anger of YHWH will burn against you and destroy you quickly.
But thus you shall do to them: tear down their altars, smash their pillars, cut down their Asherah poles, and burn their carved images with fire.
For a holy people are you to YHWH your Divine. YHWH your Divine chose you to be for him a treasured people from all peoples upon face of ground.
Not because you were more numerous than all peoples did YHWH delight in you and choose you, for you were the fewest of all peoples,
but because YHWH loved you and kept oath he swore to your fathers, YHWH brought you out with strong hand and redeemed you from house of slaves, from hand of Pharaoh king of Egypt.
Know that YHWH your Divine, he is Divine, faithful Divine, keeping covenant and covenant loyalty to a thousand generations with those loving him and keeping his commands,
and repaying to face one who hates him, to destroy him; he will not delay toward one who hates him; to his face he will repay him.
You shall keep command and statutes and judgments I command you today, to do them.
It shall be, because you listen to these judgments and keep and do them, YHWH your Divine will keep with you covenant and covenant loyalty he swore to your fathers.

He will love you, bless you, and multiply you; he will bless fruit of your womb and fruit of your ground, your grain, new wine, oil, offspring of cattle and increase of flock, upon ground he swore to your fathers to give you.
Blessed shall you be above all peoples; there shall not be barren male or female among you or among your livestock.
YHWH will turn away from you every sickness and will not place upon you any of harmful diseases of Egypt that you knew, but will put them upon all who hate you.
You shall consume all peoples YHWH your Divine gives you; your eye shall not pity them, and you shall not serve their gods, for that would be snare to you.
If you say in your heart, These nations are more numerous than I; how can I dispossess them?
You shall not fear them; you shall surely remember what YHWH your Divine did to Pharaoh and all Egypt,
the great trials your eyes saw, signs and wonders, strong hand and outstretched arm by which YHWH your Divine brought you out; so YHWH your Divine will do to all peoples whom you fear.
Also hornet YHWH your Divine will send among them until those remaining and hiding from you perish.
You shall not be terrified before them, for YHWH your Divine is in your midst, a great and fearsome Divine.
YHWH your Divine will clear away these nations before you little by little; you will not be able to finish them quickly, lest beasts of field multiply against you.
YHWH your Divine will give them before you and confound them with great confusion until they are destroyed.
He will give their kings into your hand, and you shall cause their name to perish from under heavens; no man shall stand before you until you destroy them.
Carved images of their gods you shall burn with fire. You shall not covet silver and gold upon them or take it for yourself, lest you be snared by it, for it is an abomination to YHWH your Divine.
You shall not bring an abomination into your house and become devoted to destruction like it; you shall utterly detest and abhor it, for devoted to destruction it is.

translation_notes: Election is rooted in love, oath, and liberation from slavery—not numerical strength or racial superiority.
Herem/total-destruction language, no-mercy commands, and destruction of sacred sites are morally dangerous ancient conquest rhetoric and must never be enacted against modern peoples or religions.

The intermarriage prohibition is framed around religious allegiance within an ancient conquest setting; it must not authorize bans on interracial, intercultural, interfaith, or queer relationships today.
Fertility and health promises must not shame infertile, disabled, or chronically ill people or imply that illness proves covenant failure.
The command to destroy images cannot justify modern iconoclasm or desecration of another community's sacred objects.
'Chosen' and 'treasured' are Jewish covenant terms and must not be turned into Christian supersessionism or ethnic supremacy.
safety_note: Never use Deuteronomy 7 to justify genocide, ethnic cleansing, forced conversion, segregation, anti-miscegenation, religious-site destruction, infertility shame, ableism, or claims of racial superiority. Preserve election as responsibility grounded in liberation, not permission to dominate.
